description: MeshTrust defines trusted Certificate Authority (CA) bundles for a trust domain in the mesh. It establishes trust relationships for service-to-service mTLS authentication by specifying which CA certificates are trusted to verify service identities, supporting PEM-encoded CA bundles and enabling secure cross-service communication within the trust domain.

apiVersion.description:
APIVersion defines the versioned schema of this representation of an object.
Servers should convert recognized schemas to the latest internal value, and
may reject unrecognized values.
More info: https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/devel/sig-architecture/api-conventions.md#resources

kind.description:
Kind is a string value representing the REST resource this object represents.
Servers may infer this from the endpoint the client submits requests to.
Cannot be updated.
In CamelCase.
More info: https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/devel/sig-architecture/api-conventions.md#types-kinds

spec.description: Spec is the specification of the Kuma MeshTrust resource.

caBundles.description:
CABundles contains a list of CA bundles supported by this TrustDomain.
At least one CA bundle must be specified.

pem.description: Pem contains the PEM-encoded CA bundle if the Type is set to a PEM-based format.

value.description: Value holds the PEM-encoded CA bundle as a string.

type.description: Type specifies the format or source type of the CA bundle.

origin.description:
Origin specifies whether the resource was created from a MeshIdentity.

Deprecated: use Status.Origin instead

trustDomain.description: TrustDomain is the trust domain associated with this resource.

status.description: Status is the current status of the Kuma MeshTrust resource.

origin.description: Origin specifies whether the resource was created from a MeshIdentity.
